subject: Fermi GRB 220103A: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

M.L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, OAGH)

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB 220103A ( Fermi GBM team, GCN 31377) errorbox  30 sec after notice time and 58 sec after trigger time at 2022-01-03 21:04:11 UT, with upper limit up to  18.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 49 deg. The sun  altitude  is -35.4 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -64 deg., longitude l = 191 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1836950

We obtain a following upper limits.
